title: VanillaEnhancedCraft
description: A small Client-Side Modpack which improved minecraft for better performance and Visual style.
body:
VanillaEnhancedCraft

A small Client-Side Modpack which improved minecraft for better performance and Visual style.

This has many aspects such as finely tuned shaders and resource packs to make it work good for the eyes as well as Voxy!

This is perfect for people who are new and experienced as this doesn't change much in terms of combat and recipes, this also has better ambiance and sounds throughout the whole of Vanilla Minecraft World as well as this works perfectly with Multiplayer giving you vast opportunities to play any server with no performance cost.

Main Mods Include:

- Voxy
- Litematica
- Xaero's World Map 
- Zoomify



***All mods are the property of the respective owners so a big thank you to them without them none of this would have happened.
